objectives.label: Mount up and walk to the training bay
objectives.briefingText: Walk to the rear hatch, enter the Telum, then move it to the exit marker.

phaseBriefing.title: Gabrielle Mech Bay - Mount Up
phaseBriefing.subtitle: EARTH DIVISION / MORNING
phaseBriefing.text: Skye is hurt, angry, and back on the schedule. Walk to the Telum, mount up, and move out.
objectives: Move the Telum to the training bay exit.
